name: SC-001: Add to cart updates badge count
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the Add to cart button for Sauce Labs Backpack, and verify the cart badge shows 1.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce and verify the Add to cart button for Sauce Labs Backpack is visible on the inventory page.

name: SC-002: Cart page is accessible
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the shopping cart icon, and verify the heading Your Cart is visible.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the shopping cart icon, and verify the text Your Cart is visible on the page.

name: SC-003: Product detail page is accessible
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the Sauce Labs Backpack product image, and verify the text "Sauce Labs Backpack" is visible on the page.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the product name Sauce Labs Backpack, and verify the product detail page heading Sauce Labs Backpack is visible.

name: SC-004: Sort by price low to high
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, select Price (low to high) from the sort dropdown, and verify the text Sauce Labs Onesie is visible on the page.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, select Price (low to high) from the sort dropdown, and verify the price $7.99 is visible on the page.

name: SC-005: Product catalog loads
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce and verify the text Sauce Labs Backpack is visible on the page.
